{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323035526D78AF43CD0BEE97429E2"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7514337905711235902","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看爱了爱了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749574518,"group_id":"7503065171263228953","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny9SHsBXwx8CUrH862f5r63dQun723hFMGqZK5NYnr74","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"2865745715271908","user_name":"用户28657457"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2865745715271908","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7503065171263228953","book_info":{"abstract":"传说中的八大僵尸
紫僵，行动迟缓，紫气缠绕。
白僵，通体白色，畏光惧火。
绿僵，不怕牲畜，只惧阳光。
毛僵，浑身毛发，不惧阳光。
飞僵，擅长法术，飞天遁地。
游尸，出入阴阳两界，集天地怨气。
伏尸，千年不朽，肉身强悍。
不化骨，不死不灭，以怨为力，以血为食。
姜祖为救回林夕，擅自使用昆仑的时间轮改变历史，昆仑派人来捉姜祖回昆仑。
林夕为救回姜祖，想尽一切办法，却找不到进入昆仑的入口。
她只能一边和简优捉鬼一边想办法，最终找到机会抓住了黑暗神以此危险昆仑放了姜祖，后来两人还剩下了爱情的结晶，魔星……
自从林夕的僵尸血和驱魔族的血融合后法力大增，加上没有了雷电符的封印，捉鬼杀鬼对她来说简直就是洒洒水。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2obc79c8a7724adca89fd99b40e2849430~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"未来本弦","author_id":"","book_id":"7503065171263228953","book_name":"我的老婆竟是僵尸之飞僵驱魔","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102038","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":867,"name":"捉鬼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=867&name=捉鬼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7503066156014518809","read_count":"2","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"256138"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"122","tags":"都市高武,都市,捉鬼","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2ofe9ff4aa924f212780428b27df204d18~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779393326&x-signature=eAwC3LmgacZhy1kUDOPK7%2F4Ca4c%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1201147032637837","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"73"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323035526D78AF43CD0BEE97429E2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":911,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5899,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":23},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1749575684,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":
